title: diplazium iridiphyllum
intro: Diplazium iridiphyllum, also known as the Chinese shield fern or golden shield fern, is a species of fern native to China and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Diplazium iridiphyllum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Diplazium iridiphyllum typically involve drying and processing the plant material into teas, capsules, or tinctures for use in medicinal applications.
